name: It's My Student's Farewell. I Want It to Be Proper.

issues.description: Text says 'during this turn' which requires duration:'DuringYourTurn', not 'EndOfTurn'
First action should be conditional/optional (text says 'You may give'). The AttachDon and PowerBoost are part of an optional sequence, not mandatory sequential actions
Target scope is incorrect. Text says 'your Characters or [Silvers Rayleigh]' — target should allow any own character OR the leader (Silvers Rayleigh), not restrict to subType in both cases
